    1. PlayerData(String, String, int, List, String, DifficultyLevel)

Klasse PlayerData

java.lang.Object
persistance.PlayerData
public class PlayerData extends Object
Represents a serializable snapshot of player data in the game.

    • name

    • difficulty

  • Konstruktordetails

    • PlayerData

      public PlayerData(String name, String phase, int placedStones, List<Integer> stonePositions, String type, DifficultyLevel difficulty)
      Creates a new PlayerData instance capturing the state of a player at a specific moment.
      Parameter:
      name - The name of the player.
      phase - The current game phase for the player.
      placedStones - The number of stones placed by the player.
      stonePositions - The positions of the stones placed by the player.
      type - The type of player (e.g. Player, CPUPlayer).
      difficulty - The difficulty for CPU players.
